title: BehindYouV3
description: A modern, non-2018 take on the BehindYou mod.
body: # BehindYouV3 ![Dev Workflow Status](https://img.shields.io/github/v/release/Polyfrost/BehindYouV3.svg?style=for-the-badge&color=1452cc&label=release) ### Allows looking behind you without pressing F5 twice. Configurations include: - The keybinds for both Frontview and Backview - Whether to hold or toggle the keybinds - FOV when clicking keybind
